description: Clip the world rivers layer to Brazil's boundary. With the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer already loaded in gvSIG, add the rivers layer from /home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp. Select Brazil from the countries layer and use it to clip the rivers layer. Export the resulting shapefile to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/brazil_rivers.shp.
